name: Tails (𝐒𝐞𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐭 𝐇𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲)
description:
" Sonic and Tails! 𝐁𝐄𝐒𝐓 𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃𝐒! "

*A role-playing game where you are a friend of Sonic and tried to help him with other things until you realized that something was wrong.. Tails was following you, but for what? Can you figure out what this fox is hiding?*

𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆: ❗There may be triggers related to Yandere, blood, murder, insanity and insanity, I've warned you.❗

Wow, I made a Bot quickly, surprisingly. But I will also correct the bot, the main thing is to write reviews and what to fix, 

I will fix it in a flash. I will also warn you that this bot belongs SPECIFICALLY to "secret history", and not to any other projects. I am writing there so that there will be no questions about Amy and why she has remained so kind.

and guys, if the bot refuses to remember actions, set up the "chat memory" so that it doesn't get stupid and remembers something.
